summary: Product Detail Feature with Tabs - All tests passed. Backend: 10/10 (100%). Frontend: All features working (Products page loads, dialog with tabs, Proveedores tab shows best offer and suppliers, Datos tab shows editable form, Save button calls PUT API successfully)

issues: React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - existing issue from previous iteration

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products-unified returns list of unified products by EAN
Backend: Unified product structure has correct fields (ean, name, best_price, best_supplier, suppliers array)
Backend: Each unified product has exactly one best offer (is_best_offer=true)
Backend: GET /api/products/{product_id} returns product with all extended fields
Backend: GET /api/products/{non_existent_id} returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/products/{product_id} updates product name and persists
Backend: PUT /api/products/{product_id} updates extended fields (referencia, part_number, stock fields, shipping fields)
Backend: PUT /api/products/{product_id} handles boolean toggle fields (activado, descatalogado, envio_gratis, etc.)
Backend: PUT /api/products/{non_existent_id} returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/products without auth returns 401/403
Frontend: Products page loads at /products with unified products table
Frontend: Eye icon button opens product detail dialog
Frontend: Dialog has two tabs: 'Proveedores' (data-testid='tab-proveedores') and 'Datos del Producto' (data-testid='tab-datos')
Frontend: Proveedores tab shows product image/name/EAN/brand/category badges
Frontend: Proveedores tab shows Best Offer card (green) with best supplier name and price
Frontend: Proveedores tab shows 'Todos los Proveedores' list with prices and stock
Frontend: Datos tab shows editable form with Name input (data-testid='edit-name')
Frontend: Datos tab shows Estado section with toggle fields (Activado, Descatalogado, etc.)
Frontend: Datos tab shows Identificadores section (referencia, part_number, ean, asin, upc, gtin, oem)
Frontend: Datos tab shows Brand input (data-testid='edit-brand') and Category
Frontend: Datos tab shows Stock fields section
Frontend: Datos tab shows Envío section with shipping fields
Frontend: Save button (data-testid='save-product-btn') appears only on Datos tab
Frontend: Save button calls PUT /api/products/{id} and shows success toast
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx has React setState warning during render - should use useEffect for navigation redirect (existing issue)
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: 3 unified products (Monitor LG with 2 suppliers, Teclado Logitech with 2 suppliers, Ratón Logitech with 1 supplier)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product detail feature fully working. Dialog has two tabs: Proveedores (shows best offer in green card and suppliers comparison) and Datos del Producto (editable form with extended fields). Save button on Datos tab calls PUT /api/products/{id}. Toggle fields use No/Sí buttons instead of switches. All data-testid attributes present: product-detail-tabs, tab-proveedores, tab-datos, edit-name, edit-brand, edit-ean, edit-activado-si/no, save-product-btn, etc.
